report.summary: The values found are within the configured reference ranges.

humanSummary.intro: Here is a clear, human-friendly summary of what the detected values may mean.
overallInterpretation: No major abnormal pattern was detected from the supported values.
whatToDo: Consult a physician if symptoms are present or values remain abnormal.
A doctor may advise repeat CBC or targeted tests based on symptoms.
simpleAdvice: Maintain balanced meals, hydration, rest, and follow-up testing.
humanSummary.finalNote: This report looks mostly reassuring for the supported values, but a doctor should review it if symptoms are present.

report.prevention: Maintain hydration, balanced meals, sleep, exercise, and follow repeat-testing advice from your clinician.
report.cure: Treatment depends on the confirmed diagnosis. Share this report with a qualified clinician for targeted care.
report.remedies: Use diet, hydration, rest, and symptom tracking as supportive care. Avoid self-medicating for abnormal results.
report.cause: Possible causes include nutrition gaps, infection, inflammation, metabolic disease, organ stress, or medication effects.
report.medicine: Do not start prescription medicines from this screen. A clinician may consider supplements, antibiotics, diabetes therapy, thyroid treatment, or other medicine based on diagnosis.
